name: obsidian
description: Obsidian integration extension — imports Obsidian Vault as a Knowledge Source, and exports Experience Memory, Specs, Plans, and Tasks as Markdown files to the Vault.

capabilities.import: Retrieve Markdown/Canvas files from Obsidian Vault as a Knowledge Source
capabilities.export: Output Specs, Plans, Tasks, and deliverables as Markdown to the Vault
capabilities.bidirectional_link: Leverage Obsidian's link structure for knowledge graph references

note: Works fully offline. Simply configure the Vault path to enable integration. No Obsidian purchase or account required.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
